name: Cleverbridge Subscription Commerce API
what_it_does: B2B subscription commerce platform with REST API — enabling enterprise software and SaaS companies to manage global subscription billing, software license delivery, renewal automation, and partner/reseller management, acting as merchant of record for global tax compliance, with a focus on enterprise software (cybersecurity, productivity, anti-virus) subscription lifecycle management.
use_cases: Managing enterprise software subscriptions via Cleverbridge API for renewal automation
Processing global B2B software license payments via Cleverbridge for multi-currency billing
Automating subscription upgrades and downgrades via Cleverbridge for customer lifecycle management
Integrating Cleverbridge with CRM via API for subscription data sync and renewal alerts
Managing partner/reseller channels via Cleverbridge API for indirect software distribution
not_for: Consumer-focused subscription businesses (Cleverbridge is B2B enterprise software)
Physical goods e-commerce (Cleverbridge is digital goods and software only)
Small SaaS startups needing simple subscription management (use Stripe Billing or Chargebee)
best_when: An enterprise software vendor (cybersecurity, productivity, anti-virus, B2B SaaS) needs a full subscription commerce platform with global MoR tax compliance, partner channels, and renewal automation — where Cleverbridge handles the complexity of global software licensing.
avoid_when: You're a startup, sell physical goods, or need consumer-friendly checkout without enterprise software licensing complexity.

auth.notes: HTTP Basic auth with client credentials (username/password pair from Cleverbridge). API partner account required. REST API access via enterprise partnership. Webhooks for subscription lifecycle events. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Separate sandbox/staging environment. API access gated by enterprise agreement.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise partnership required
pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue share model; Enterprise SaaS platform fee + transaction percentage
pricing.notes: German company (Cologne). Founded 2005. Acquired by Hg Capital (UK private equity) 2019. Previously owned by ABBYY (partial stake). Customers: Acronis, Kaspersky, ABBYY, Avast, Cylance, Verizon Media. 150+ currencies. 45+ languages. Merchant of Record for global tax compliance. B2B-first — enterprise procurement workflows, PO numbers, volume licensing. Partner/reseller management. Renewal automation engine. Risk management and fraud prevention. Software key delivery (license key fulfillment). SaaS subscription management. Not a developer-first API company — primarily a commerce platform with API access.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Enterprise-only REST API. HTTP Basic auth. Webhooks for lifecycle events. PCI-DSS/GDPR/SOC2 compliant. German/EU company. Annual contract. API access requires enterprise partnership. Not developer-first — primarily a commerce platform.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Subscription reads idempotent by subscription ID. Order reads idempotent by order ID. Renewal operations — verify before retry. License reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Enterprise partnership required — not self-service API access
HTTP Basic auth with enterprise credentials — not simple API key
Primarily a commerce platform with API as secondary interface — UI-first workflows
Merchant of Record model: Cleverbridge is the seller of record, not your company
B2B enterprise focus — purchase orders, volume licensing, indirect channels add complexity
German company under German/EU law — GDPR applies by default, stricter data handling

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. PCI-DSS compliant. GDPR compliant. SOC2. German company under strict EU data protection. HTTP Basic auth. Enterprise partner vetting reduces unauthorized access risk. Payment data never stored by merchant (MoR model). EU and US data residency. Enterprise security review process.
